fee_type.text: ประเภทค่าธรรมเนียม

root.sql: select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_ucf_fee.fee_name, sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract from sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_lon_m_req_fee, sc_lon_ucf_fee, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_ucf_fee.fee_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status = '1' ) and ( sc_lon_ucf_fee.fee_type = '!fee_type!' ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.approve_date between '!approve_date_1!' and '!approve_date_2!' ) )
